summary: cleanup.ts is excellent: explicit types, pure functions, comprehensive validation, clear error messages. Workflow YAML is solid with pinned actions and minimal permissions. run-act.ts has structural issues: inconsistent imports (require() inline at lines 69, 71 vs. top-level), fragile string replacement for NOW_ISO patching (line 70), hardcoded filesToCopy list (lines 36-44) that could fall out of sync. File setup in run-act.ts (lines 36-73) has repetitive boilerplate suitable for factoring. Core logic is ship-ready; test harness patterns risk maintenance burden as test complexity grows.
